title: High Accuracy, No Recall (Imbalanced Class)
content: A loan default model achieved 96% accuracy on a dataset with only 5% defaulters. The minority F1 score was 0.02 (no defaults correctly predicted). Random train/test split masked the imbalance issue. This indicates misuse of accuracy on an imbalanced dataset [14†L310-L314][32†L223-L230].
error_logs: Warning: Imbalanced data detected (5% minority class).
Model failed to predict any minority instances.
agent_usage_notes: The RootCauseAnalyzerAgent references this past experiment when evaluating models with high overall accuracy but low minority subgroup performance.

title: Target Leakage via Date Feature
content: A stock prediction model using historical data achieved 98% accuracy. Investigation found a date feature including future timestamps, which the model used to 'cheat' on test data. When date was removed, accuracy dropped to 70%. Such high accuracy strongly suggests target leakage [33†L9-L16].
error_logs: Detected future-date feature in training set.
agent_usage_notes: Agents check this to compare feature sets and timestamps, flag date-based leakage, and recommend temporal validation splitting.

title: Validation Split Missed Data Drift
content: A sales forecast model was trained on last year’s data and tested on two-month-old data. After deployment, 3 months later, prediction error spiked by 15%. Retraining with recent data fixed the issue. This indicates natural data drift over time [43†L119-L127].
error_logs: Alert: Model MSE increased 12% relative to baseline.
agent_usage_notes: The ExperimentHistorianAgent references this to compare current feature drifts and recommend monitoring thresholds.

title: Overfitting Detected by Sharp Accuracy Drop
content: An image classification model with many layers reached 99% training accuracy but only 65% on validation. The model likely memorized the training set. Adding regularization and early stopping are recommended to prevent overfitting [32†L180-L188].
error_logs: TensorFlow warning: No weight decay in model layers.
agent_usage_notes: Used by the RootCauseAnalyzerAgent to analyze train vs. validation score splits and suggest regularization parameters.

title: Noisy Labels Impact
content: A sentiment analysis model trained on crowd-sourced labels had 88% accuracy. Manual review showed 10% label noise (mislabelled reviews). Cleaning labels and retraining improved accuracy to 95%. This shows data quality issues (noisy labels) can mask true performance.
agent_usage_notes: Used to cross-examine label quality and suggest label cleaning/auditing.

title: Fairness Issue: Subgroup Disparity
content: A hiring recommendation model had 90% overall accuracy. Responsible AI checks revealed that precision was 99% for male candidates but only 60% for females. This subgroup disparity indicates a fairness failure requiring bias mitigation (e.g. balanced data or fairness constraints) [25†L68-L77].
error_logs: Fairness alert: Female subgroup precision 39% lower than overall.
agent_usage_notes: Consulted by agents to evaluate subgroup fairness risks and recommend post-processing mitigations or metrics (e.g., equalized odds).
